description.ko: 지표면의 건조한 지질학적 형성과 풍부한 광물 퇴적물 사이의 자연스러운 대비를 보여주는 항공 시점의 정교한 시각적 탐구입니다.
description.en: A detailed visual exploration of the Earth's surface from an aerial perspective, showcasing the natural contrast between dry geological formations and rich mineral deposits.

prompt: Top-down satellite view of intricate earth textures, featuring deep tectonic cracks, swirling patterns of golden sand dunes, and patches of oxidised red clay. High-resolution geological survey style, macro photography of soil layers, vibrant mineral veins running through dry mud, cinematic lighting highlighting every ridge and valley, 8k resolution, photorealistic organic detail.
